metadata.description: Map of Azure region name to storage account resource ID. Example: {"eastus": "/subscriptions/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/resourceGroups/rg-diag/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/stdiageastus", "westeurope": "/subscriptions/..."}
Name of the diagnostic setting created and managed by this policy.
Map of tag name to tag value. Only resources matching ALL specified tags will have diagnostic settings deployed. Leave empty to apply to all resources.
Map of tag name to tag value. Resources matching ALL specified tags will be excluded from diagnostic settings deployment. Leave empty to exclude no resources.
Log category groups to enable. 'allLogs' captures every available category; 'audit' captures audit events only. Specify one or both.
